full_text:
Emperor Yu (Yu the Great) 舜禹大禹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Emperor Yu (Yu the Great) (舜禹大禹). Ancient Chinese Emperor. One of the Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors. Emperor Yu (Yu the Great) was affiliated with Xia Dynasty.
